The second contestant added an "M" and then guessed "the question reminds." And finally the third contestant bought an "E" resulting in the puzzle "THE Q_ ESTION RE_ _INS." He didn't even try to guess before the buzzer sounded. Host Pat Sajak was shocked all three contestants could not solve the puzzle.
